items.author: LiLi
items.title: Defective item
items.content: came looking just fine, turns out it didn’t wanna charge and is broken internally so it’s useless. I wasn’t even able to use it and i feel like it charges well but i can’t tell because it came DEFECTIVE.

items.author: Leethal
items.title: Nice job making this one.
items.content: Slim east to use and on the go!!

items.author: Night Owl
items.title: Works Well, It's a Buy!
items.content: Great phone charging bank, better than my old anker of the same variety, an upgrade. Cord built in, digital charge read out, and great capacity.

items.author: S.G.
items.title: Cord stopped working after just only days.
items.content: Have always been a huge proponent of Anker products ever since I had a battery bank years ago that I had to replace because it got lost. Unfortunately, this product was not what I thought it would be. Works well and charges fast, however, within days the built in USB-C cable stopped working. The battery bank still works fine, but now I need to carry around a cord, which defeats the purpose of why I bought this in the first place.

items.author: ERIC
items.title: Device was confiscated on a domestic fight within China
items.content: I am writing to provide feedback regarding the product. While I am happy with the quality of the device, I encountered a significant issue during travel. The product was confiscated on a domestic flight within China. It appears the device does not comply with local policies for air travel because it lacks the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) marking. I wanted to bring this to your attention so you are aware of these requirements for customers traveling in that region.

items.author: John Villanueva
items.title: Must have to travel.
items.content:
I travel a lot and this is a must have!
Batterlife is great! Charges phones super fast.
Quite heavy, very convenient to use.
I bring this wherever I go!

items.author: D. Wiles
items.title: Great powerbank
items.content: Great charger

items.author: ed
items.title: Lasted only little over a year
items.content: I bought this awesome Anker power bank February 2025. It has worked flawlessly ever since till now June 2026. It doesn't not charge any of my devices anymore properly. Very disappointed since im a big Anker supporter and have many of their products.

items.author: CHARLES
items.title: Don't buy if you're traveling to china!
items.content: False advertising! I specifically purchased this power bank to go to china. However it was confiscated upon my arrival at the airport in Shanghai. You cannot travel to china with this even though it's advertised that way. There is no CCC symbol which is what you need to have or they will take it. Absolute waste of money, do not buy for a trip to china.

items.author: Jamby
items.title: Pretty decent, only one real flaw
items.content: It charges my phone relatively quick, the device itself takes a little while to charge but that makes sense if I can’t charge my phone multiple times. Really my biggest complaint is how short the charging cord is attached to the bank. I wish it was on a pull cord, or make the cord wrap around the bank. Having the cord be about 6 inches is annoying

items.author: Ross
items.title: Very good battery pack!
items.content: 10 out of 10 would recommend! Its a little bigger than my phone but does it charge! My phone could be in the low 20% and this will fully charge it and the power bank still has 87% left on it. I ordered this at the perfect time being we had a tornado and lost power for a few hours. If i didn't have it my phone would have been dead from the news updates I was getting.

items.author: Amazon Customer
items.title: Great for charging multiple devices
items.content: Perfect for travel. Love the digital display.

items.author: Ed Wick
items.title: Awesome, Powerful, and Fast to Charge!
items.content: Awesome and powerful. It charges other powerful devices such as the iPhone quickly and it charges quickly with a higher voltage transformer/plug. At first, I thought that the power bank might be a bit bulky and heavy, but it would fit in a pocket and charge my iPhone and other devices--so a good size. I purchased too many other power banks that claimed to be powerful and portable, but while they were more portable, the power was seriously lacking. I love the built-in USB C cable design; there is no need to carry a separate USB-C cable when you are in the airplane or on the road. The display clearly tells you the percentage of charge remaining.

items.author: g.nuggs
items.title: Great battery
items.content: Quite heavy as noted but has enough battery to keep my phone charged on a 6 hour road trip with my phone gps on the whole way on the highest brightness setting and then some. Charges up quickly too. I don’t think I would carry this in my purse with me but on trips, this is great to have.

items.author: Sanjay S.
items.title: Dual charging ports
items.content: Good charge, however bulky in size.

items.author: Mike Schmidt
items.title: Good Value!
items.content: Hefty super powered battery pack. Love that it has both a built in cable (USB-C) and the ability to add a longer one (both USB-A and USB-C)!

items.author: michael duffy
items.title: doesnt work
items.content: Worked one time, then broke. No returns allowed. There is a reason why it's on sale

items.author: Victor Cheruyot
items.title: New and pretty good
items.content: It is working well and in good condition

items.author: Daniel
items.title: Good and reliable power bank.
items.content: Took this power bank to Nepal on Annapurna Trek. Can only say good things about it. Recharges fast, and at one overnight stop I used it to recharge the phone and both of my headlamps, since the electrical outlet at the place we stayed was unavailable. I also like that the cable is stored in such a way that it doesn't protrude beyond the body of the charger and is not dangling.

items.author: Rob Yull
items.title: High capacity multi-unit portable battery
items.content:
Had been shopping around for a portable charging unit that could charge my family's phones while on vacation. Wanted something portable with a large capacity. I have had other Anker hardware and had good luck with them before.

While this unit is not small, it is still relatively portable. It fit in my travel backpack, as well as the sling backpack I was planning on wearing on the trip.

It can charge 3 devices at the same time. It has 1 USB-C port, 1 USB-A port, and an integrated USB-C cable. All of the ports have fast charging capability.

The integrated cable can be used to plug into a USB-C power source to charge battery. The other USB-C port can also be used to charge the battery. The USB-A port is only for charging other devices.

It also has a display that reports the percentage of battery capacity it has remaining.

I used the charger almost every day. I could charge my phone from about 50% to 100% in less than an hour, even when multiple devices were being charged. I had also brought an extra long USB-A to USB-C cable, so I could use my phone, while the battery was still in the sling bag.

Whlie it isn't the smallest battery, the charging capacity as well as the ability to charge multiple devices was a big plus.
